title: gasSolidSplitter operation
description: Ideal specification-driven gas-solid separator. The split is set directly, with no efficiency physics or size classification; the feed particle-size distribution passes through unchanged.

solidsRecovery.title: Solids recovery
solidsRecovery.description: Fraction of the solid mass sent to the captured-solids outlet.

gasCarryover.title: Gas carryover
gasCarryover.description: Fraction of the gas leaving with the solids outlet.
